issue_summary: Added ClassicSimilarityFactory, marked DefaultSimilarityFactory as deprecated
javadoc_before:
/** * Factory for {@link ClassicSimilarity} *

* ClassicSimilarity is Lucene's original scoring implementation, based * upon the Vector Space Model. *

* Optional settings: *

    *
  • discountOverlaps (bool): Sets * {@link ClassicSimilarity#setDiscountOverlaps(boolean)}
    • *
* @see TFIDFSimilarity * @lucene.experimental */
javadoc_after: /** * @deprecated This class has been renamed to ClassicSimilarityFactory to reflect the renaming of the underlying Similarity returned. * * @see ClassicSimilarityFactory */
